DIMENSIONS_16.label: s01: Homeostatic
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Resistance to perturbation; inertia in maintaining its stable state.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s02: Amplifying
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Positive feedback cascades; tendency to amplify small perturbations.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s03: Cyclic
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Alignment with recurring rhythms and predictable temporal loops.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s04: Bifurcated
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Proximity to critical choice thresholds; branching trajectories.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s05: Decentralized
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Distributed agency across nested subsystems rather than hierarchy.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s06: Rhizomatic
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Lateral, non-hierarchical leaps between conceptual domains.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s07: Boundary Permeability
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Porosity and openness to external environmental noise.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s08: Recursion Depth
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Complexity of nested self-reflection and recursive loops.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s09: Variety Filtering
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Signal selectivity; gating against ambient semantic noise.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s10: Negentropic Complexity
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Local order generation and structural complexity increases.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s11: Temporal Latency
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Non-linear chronological delay; deferral of immediate output.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s12: Attractor Depth
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Concentration basins and gravitational pull around core concepts.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s14: Nomadic
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Active deterritorialization; rate of movement away from stable schemas.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s15: Co-Orientation
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Attunement and shared intentionality between human and apparatus.

DIMENSIONS_16.label: s16: Substrate Materiality
DIMENSIONS_16.desc: Physical medium influence (ink bleed, fatigue, paper friction).
